originalTitle: Nvidia Stock Just Did Something for the First Time in More Than 5 Years. Here's What History Says Happens Next.
summary: Nvidia stock has only gained 8% this year, roughly in line with the S&P 500.
content: Nvidia stock has only gained 8% this year, roughly in line with the S&P 500.

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
